data.title: India demands GitHub to remove 3 of Jack Dorsey's Bitchat repositories within 3 hours, citing app's role in protests.
data.description: GitHub was recently instructed to remove three code repositories within a strict three-hour deadline. The request was made due to concerns regarding the messaging app's utilization during internet shutdowns that occur during protests.

data.title: Powers of Reasoning Named Ad Age Media Agency of the Year
data.description: In New York, Powers of Reasoning was named Media Agency of the Year and awarded Campaign of the Year for their work on the DUDE Wipes' "The Big Dump" at the 2026 Small Agency Awards by Ad Age. This recognition underscores the agency's excellence in media strategy.

data.title: Mineros S.A. Q2 2026 Results Conference Call to Be Held August 6, 2026
data.description: A conference call will be held by Mineros S.A. (TSX: MSA | OTCQX: MNSAF | BVC: MINEROS) on Thursday, August 6, 2026, at 8:00 AM Colombian Standard Time (9:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time). Registration is necessary to participate in the live webcast, with interested parties advised to sign up in advance. Access to the webcast should be made around ten minutes before the scheduled call time. The webcast will be available for later viewing on the Company’s website at www.

data.title: New Analysis of Phase 3 Pooled Data for Organon’s VTAMA® (tapinarof) cream, 1%, Demonstrates Early, Consistent Improvements in Atopic Dermatitis Patients Across Pediatric Age Groups and in Adults1
data.description: Jersey City, New Jersey - Organon has recently unveiled an analysis of Phase 3 pooled data for VTAMA (tapinarof) cream, 1%, demonstrating early and consistent improvements in eczema patients across various age groups. This analysis presents promising results for the medication, showcasing its effectiveness in treating eczema. This is a significant development in the field of dermatology, highlighting the potential of VTAMA cream in providing relief to individuals suffering from eczema.

data.title: Cotality recognized in Insurance Business's Global 5-Star Technology and Software Providers 2026
data.description: A prominent global provider of property information, analytics, and data solutions, Cotality™, has been acknowledged in Insurance Business's Global 5-Star Technology and Software Providers 2026 report. The recognition emphasizes Cotality's efforts in integrating underwriting, claims, and restoration processes into a seamless workflow. Specifically noted in the Claims Management segment, Cotality's Claims Workspace™ solution garnered acclaim for its comprehensive approach aimed at serving as a unified platform to facilitate these operations.

data.title: Swiss Private Bank Makes First Investment Into Mbanq’s Newly Launched Note Listed on Düsseldorf Stock Exchange
data.description: Zurich - Mbanq, a U.S.-based provider of banking infrastructure and embedded finance technology, revealed that its new institutional funding initiative has secured its first investment from a prominent Swiss private bank. This investment signifies a significant advancement in Mbanq's institutional funding capacity and bolsters the further growth of the company's lending and Earned Wage Access (EWA) platform. Earned Wage Access has gained traction as a convenient financial solution.
